name: PT Duta Pertiwi Nusantara Tbk
summary: PT Duta Pertiwi Nusantara Tbk engages in the glue, chemical, and mining businesses in Indonesia. It operates through two divisions, Glue Industry and Coal Mining. The company offers urea formaldehyde, phenol formaldehyde, urea melamine formaldehyde, and particle board glues and hardeners; semi-finished products, including formaldehyde; hardeners for producing plywood; and additives, such as emission bonding agents, etc. It is also involved in mining coal. The company was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Pontianak, Indonesia. PT Duta Pertiwi Nusantara Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Dutapermana Makmur.
